tasks.content: Analyze existing codebase structure and identify missing components
Create autonomous agent daemon with discovery cycle scheduler
Implement quality gate detector (lint, type-check, test, build)
Build task queue management and prioritization system
Implement the 5-phase workflow (Analyze, Plan, Execute, Audit, Report)
Add System Audit Framework (10 dimensions) integration
Implement metrics tracking and auto-update of evolution docs
Add emergency break conditions and error handling
Create verification pipeline integration (pre-commit, CI, Danger.js)
Write comprehensive tests for the autonomous agent
